data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having a unique link per meeting for security purposes. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that the generated link is unique for each meeting, as it only describes the creation of a Zoom meeting link without explicitly stating that it is unique for each booking. The linked use case mentions the automatic creation of a unique Zoom meeting room, but there is no evidence that supports the uniqueness of the link in the context of multiple bookings, leading to a gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the generated link is unique for each meeting.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
